text: The repetition of the phrase 'I'm going to get you out of here' echoes anxiously in my ears as I look through the glass into the conference or classroom setting. There is a sense of urgency and perhaps dislocation—my perspective is tilted, almost as if I am not grounded in the moment, separated from those within. Moving to the second image, the vibrant wall celebrating innovation and research feels both familiar and foreign, as though I am transitioning between two distinct realities. I sense the power of intention and the undercurrent of needing escape or change, but am unsure whether I want rescue or deeper immersion.
